docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77862685), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALSTOCK VENTURES, LLC SERVED OCT-29-2025, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, LUIS
